title: Friction layer taxonomy (spec|context|environment|verification|state)
action: Per D5: friction backlog entry format gains optional layer field, fixed enum spec|context|environment|verification|state (course L01 five-layer attribution); grooming's friction-clusters hunt also groups by layer and the entropy report adds one line: friction count by layer, largest = bottleneck layer this cycle. Additive only; no cell-schema change. CREATION-LOG notes citing docs/09 item 2.

truths: Existing friction entries without layer stay valid
prohibitions: No new file, no helper change

trace.outcome: Optional layer enum documented in friction entry format; grooming tallies per layer and reports the bottleneck layer; existing entries stay valid; CREATION-LOG notes with pressure scenarios.
